dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.closingMessage: You can close this window now
dashboard.tipDisableTips: Tip: turn off tips in config → general → Search & Buttons
dashboard.tipDisableTipsAlt: Tip: disable tip rotation in config if you want a cleaner footer
dashboard.tipPackedColumns: Tip: tight columns off in config → general
dashboard.tipHideShortcutPin: Tip: turn off shortcut and pin icons in config → general → Dashboard for more bookmark space

config.title: configuration
config.statsIntro: Overview across all bookmark pages (read-only). Open the tab again after saving to refresh numbers.
config.statsNeverOpenedLabel: Never opened (no opens and no last-opened timestamp)
config.packedColumns: Tight column stack (categories fill height, less empty space)
config.packedColumnsSaveError: Could not save column layout setting.
config.showButtonText: Show text next to the button
config.interleaveModeInfoMessage:
Enabled:
• Press any letter to start fuzzy search (find bookmarks by name)
• Press '/' followed by letters to use shortcuts (e.g., /yt for YouTube)

Disabled:
• Press any letter to start shortcut search
• Press '/' followed by letters to use fuzzy search
config.packedColumnsInfoMessage:
When enabled, bookmark/category blocks are distributed round-robin across columns on wider screens.

• Reduces empty vertical gaps
• Can make reading order feel less top-to-bottom
• Saved instantly when toggled
config.showSyncToastsInfoMessage:
Show or hide cross-tab sync toasts.

• On: brief confirmation when another tab applies config/settings updates
• Off: no sync popup noise, but sync still happens
config.globalShortcutsInfoMessage:
When enabled, shortcuts from every page can be used anywhere.

• Faster launch across pages
• Higher chance of shortcut conflicts if duplicates exist
config.showBookmarkStatusInfoMessage:
Enables status indicators for bookmarks.

• Status checks only run for bookmarks with their status toggle enabled
• Useful for service links, but can add extra network checks
config.skipFastPingInfoMessage:
Changes how status checks run.

• Off: quick connectivity ping first, then HTTP check
• On: skip quick ping and run HTTP-only check
• Use if fast ping causes false negatives in your setup
config.backupInfo: This will download a ZIP file containing all your bookmarks, pages, categories, settings, and custom themes.
config.backupError: Failed to create backup. Please try again.
config.importInfo:
Select a ZIP file exported from nextDash to restore your bookmarks, pages, categories, settings, and custom themes. This will replace your current data.

Important: Do not modify or rename any files inside the ZIP backup, as this may cause import errors.
config.importSuccess: Data imported successfully! The page will reload.
config.importError: Failed to import data. Please try again.
config.importInvalidFile: Invalid file. Please select a valid nextDash backup ZIP file.
config.importConfirmMessage: This will replace all your current bookmarks, pages, categories, settings, and custom themes with the data from the selected file. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?
config.fuzzySuggestionsStartWith: Only show suggestions that start with the query
config.fuzzySuggestionsInfoMessage:
When enabled, shows additional bookmark suggestions in shortcut search that contain the typed letters anywhere in their name.

For example:
• Typing 'ho' will show bookmarks like 'HomePage', 'PhotoShop', etc.
• Works alongside existing shortcut matches
• Can be further filtered with the sub-option below
config.includeFindersInSearchInfoMessage:
When enabled, you can access finders directly from the main search.

• Type a finder shortcut (e.g., "YT") and press space to automatically switch to finder mode.
• If a bookmark has the same shortcut as a finder, both options will appear for selection.
config.keepSearchOpenWhenEmptyInfoMessage:
When enabled, the search UI stays open even with an empty query.

• Good for keyboard-only workflows
• Can feel busier if you prefer a minimal idle state
config.showTipsInfoMessage:
Shows rotating shortcut/help tips above action buttons.

• Helpful for onboarding and reminding advanced shortcuts
• Turn off for a cleaner footer
config.showPageTabsInfoMessage:
Controls whether page navigation tabs are visible.

• On: click/tap tabs to switch pages
• Off: switch pages using keyboard shortcuts only
config.showPageNamesInTabsInfoMessage:
Controls tab labels when tabs are visible.

• On: show page names
• Off: show page numbers
config.alwaysCollapseCategoriesInfoMessage:
When enabled, categories start collapsed when dashboard data loads.

• Cleaner first view
• Requires extra clicks to open content each session
config.deviceSpecificEnabled: Device-specific settings enabled. Settings will now be stored locally.
config.deviceSpecificDisabled: Device-specific settings disabled. Current values will be saved to global settings when you click Save.
config.removePageMessage: Are you sure you want to remove the page "{pageName}"? All bookmarks in this page will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
config.unsavedChangesLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page?
config.unsavedChangesSavePrompt: Save changes before leaving this page?
config.unsavedChangesLeaveMessage: All unsaved changes will be lost.
config.unsavedColorChangesLeaveConfirm: You have unsaved color changes. Leave this page?
config.unsavedColorChangesSavePrompt: Save color changes before leaving this page?
config.categoryRemoved: Category removed and cleared from bookmarks
config.resetSettingsMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to defaults? This will remove all your bookmarks and categories. This action cannot be undone.
config.removeBookmarkMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this bookmark? This action cannot be undone.
config.removeFinderMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this finder? This action cannot be undone.
config.moveBookmarkMessage: Select the page to move this bookmark to:
config.bookmarkAlreadyHere: Bookmark is already in this page
config.removeCategoryMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this category? This action cannot be undone.
config.removeCustomThemeMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this custom theme? This action cannot be undone.
config.hyprModeInfoMessage: HyprMode is designed for when nextDash is installed as a Progressive Web App (PWA). When enabled, clicking on bookmarks will open them in a new browser tab and then automatically close the PWA window, mimicking the behavior of a traditional app launcher.
config.resetOnboardingHint: Run the first-run wizard again on the dashboard (language, layout, bookmark tips). Saves immediately.
config.resetOnboardingSuccess: Onboarding reset. Open the dashboard to start the wizard.
config.helpPageNavItems:
• Quick start
  • First-run onboarding
  • Navigation
  • Dashboard bookmarks
  • Search & modes
  • Date & weather
  • Smart collections
  • Sorting & pinned
  • Manage bookmarks
  • Finders
  • Status monitor
  • Tips rotation
  • Backup & import
  • Theme & branding
  • Data & sync
  • Troubleshooting
config.helpPageQuickStartItems:
• Open search with >, type a bookmark, press Enter.
  • Open recent bookmarks with *.
  • Open keyboard cheatsheet with ! or Ctrl+/.
  • Open config and tune dashboard layout, sorting, and smart collections.
config.helpPageOnboardingItems:
• On first launch, a short guided setup helps configure the dashboard in minutes.
  • You can choose language, link behavior, weather/date preferences, search mode, and how to use bookmarks from the keyboard and mouse.
  • The wizard supports live language switching while you are in onboarding.
  • You can always skip and change everything later in config#general.
config.helpPageNavigationItems:
• Switch pages with number keys 1-9.
  • Move between pages with Shift + Left/Right.
  • Navigate bookmarks with Up/Down and Left/Right.
  • Open selected bookmark with Enter or Space.
  • Clear keyboard selection with Esc (also undoes the latest drag reorder when applicable).
config.helpPageBookmarksDashboardItems:
• Keyboard: arrow keys move the highlight; ; (semicolon) opens inline edit on the highlighted row or when focus is on a bookmark link (e.g. after Tab).
  • Mouse — left strip: the narrow drag handle on the left of each row is for dragging: reorder inside a category or drop into another category column.
  • Mouse — long-press: press and hold about half a second on the bookmark row (not on the drag strip) to open the same inline edit form.
  • Hover: hovering a bookmark can load preview metadata when that behavior is enabled in settings.
config.helpPageSearchItems:
• > open normal search, : commands, ? finders.
  • / fuzzy search behavior depends on the configured search mode.
  • Use commands like :layout, :density, and :buttons for quick UI changes.
  • Use filters in search: category:work, status:online, page:2.
  • Turn on "Keep search open when empty" for fast repeated searches.
config.helpPageDateWeatherItems:
• Toggle date and time independently, and choose date format: short slash, short dash, MM/DD/YYYY, YYYY-MM-DD, weekday only, or long weekday.
  • Choose time format: 24-hour or 12-hour AM/PM.
  • Date/time render on one line as 13:35 @ 30-04-2026; weather renders on the next line.
  • Weather line includes a small icon per condition (clear/cloudy/rain/snow/fog/drizzle/thunderstorm/unknown).
  • Enable weather display and select location source (browser or manual city).
  • Set Celsius/Fahrenheit and weather refresh interval from the Date & Weather card in general settings.
  • If weather does not show, verify manual location text and save once.
config.helpPageSmartItems:
• Recently opened, Stale bookmarks, and Most used are generated automatically.
  • Each smart collection can be enabled per page and limited in visible items.
  • Set limit to 0 for unlimited items.
  • Smart sections support collapse/expand on dashboard.
config.helpPageSortingItems:
• Pinned bookmarks always stay on top of non-pinned bookmarks.
  • Pinned state is shown with a compact pin icon on dashboard rows.
  • Pinned bookmarks are always sorted alphabetically.
  • Non-pinned bookmarks use your selected sort mode (manual, A-Z, recent, pinned-first behavior).
  • Categories can be collapsed and can default to collapsed.
config.helpPageManageItems:
• Add, edit, reorder, move, and remove bookmarks in config.
  • Set bookmark icons in config via file upload or icon URL; use Clear to remove and Undo in the toast to restore.
  • Bulk actions: select, move category, toggle pin, delete.
  • On the dashboard, drag the left strip handle to reorder or move bookmarks; long-press the row (not the strip) to open inline edit.
  • Use Alt+Up / Alt+Down to reorder quickly in config lists.
  • Conflict highlighting warns about duplicate URLs and shortcuts before save.
config.helpPageFindersItems:
• Format: ?shortcut your query (example: ?g nextdash).
  • Use %s in finder URL where query should be inserted.
  • If bookmark and finder share a shortcut, both options are shown in search context.
config.helpPageStatusItems:
• Enable status checks to display online/offline state.
  • Optionally show ping and loading indicators.
  • Use "Skip fast ping check" to reduce noise and speed up checks.
config.helpPageTipsItems:
• Tips rotate every 5 to 8 seconds.
  • After every 5 normal tips, a priority tip is shown.
  • Priority tips include recent, cheatsheet, ; inline edit, left-strip drag hint, navigation, and new-bookmark shortcuts.
  • The new bookmark modal supports optional icon file upload and icon URL when creating a bookmark.
  • You can toggle tips in config#general under Dashboard.
config.helpPageBackupItems:
• ZIP backup exports pages, bookmarks, categories, settings, and themes.
  • Importing ZIP replaces current data.
  • There is no CSV or spreadsheet export/import — use ZIP backup only.
  • Best practice: create a backup before large edits or imports.
config.helpPageBrandingItems:
• Choose theme, font size, font weight, and layout preset.
  • Enable auto dark mode to follow system appearance and switch between the default dark/light variants instantly.
  • Upload custom favicon and custom font.
config.helpPageDataItems:
• Server-side data is stored in /data.
  • Device-specific settings are stored in browser local storage.
  • When device-specific mode is enabled, visual behavior can differ between devices.
config.helpPageTroubleshootItems:
• No bookmarks visible: check page selector and category filter in config.
  • Sorting seems wrong: verify sort mode and pin state.
  • Tips not visible: enable "Show tips above buttons" in Dashboard settings.
  • Search misses items: try fuzzy search and filter syntax.
config.helpPageTroubleshootFooter: Found a bug or have feedback? Visit the GitHub repository to report issues or suggest improvements.
config.helpPageSignature: Made with ❤️ by Jordi Brouwer.

help.title: Help & Shortcuts
help.introduction: Welcome to nextDash! Here are the main features and shortcuts to help you navigate and use the app efficiently.
help.shortcutsLauncher: Bookmark Shortcuts: Press any letter key on the dashboard to start typing a shortcut. For example, if you have a bookmark with shortcut yt, just type yt and the app will open it automatically.
help.fuzzySearch: Fuzzy Search: Press / to search for bookmarks by name. Start typing and it will find matches as you go.
help.commands: Commands: Type : followed by a command to control the app. Available commands include: theme (switch theme), columns (change columns), fontsize (change font size), and more to come.
help.pageNavigation: Page Navigation: Use number keys 1, 2, 3, etc. to switch between pages on the dashboard.
help.touchNavigation: Touch Navigation: On mobile or touch devices, swipe left or right to change pages.
help.arrowNavigation: Arrow Navigation: Press Shift + Left Arrow or Shift + Right Arrow to navigate between pages.
help.keyboardNavigation: Keyboard Navigation: Arrow keys move the bookmark highlight. Enter or Space opens. ; (semicolon) opens inline edit on the highlighted row or when a bookmark link has focus (e.g. after Tab).
help.searchMode: Search Mode: You can switch the search behavior. By default, typing starts shortcuts and / starts fuzzy search. You can toggle this in config#general.
help.findersIntro: Finders: Create shortcuts for search engines and websites. Start your search with ? followed by your finder shortcut to quickly search on external sites.
help.findersActivation: Activation: Type ?shortcut searchterm on the dashboard. For example, if you have a finder with shortcut g for Google, type ?g javascript to search for "javascript" on Google.
help.findersConfig: Configuration: Go to config#finders to add, edit, or remove finders. Each finder needs a name, search URL, and shortcut.
help.findersUrlFormat: URL Format: Use %s in the URL where you want the search term to be inserted, or leave it out to append the search term to the end of the URL. Examples: https://google.com/search?q=%s, https://youtube.com/search?q=%s, https://github.com/search?q=%s, https://store.steampowered.com/search?term=%s.
help.dataStorage: Data Storage: All app data is saved in the /data directory. This includes JSON files for settings (your dashboard settings), pages (pages order), and colors (custom themes), as well as uploaded favicon, fonts, and individual bookmark pages (bookmarks-1.json, bookmarks-2.json, etc.).
help.deviceSpecificSettings: Device-Specific Settings: When enabled, your dashboard settings are saved locally in your browser instead of on the server. This means settings are specific to this device/browser and won't sync across different devices.
help.feedback: Found a bug or have feedback? Visit the GitHub repository to report issues or suggest improvements.
help.extensionIntro: nextDash includes a Chrome extension that allows you to quickly add bookmarks from any webpage directly to your dashboard.
help.extensionInstall: To install the extension: Clone the GitHub repository to your local machine, or download the latest version from here. Then go to Chrome's extension settings (chrome://extensions/), enable "Developer mode", and click "Load unpacked". Select the extension folder from the downloaded or cloned repository.
help.extensionConfig: Configuration: Once installed, open the extension and go to the Settings tab. Enter your nextDash URL, set the Default Page where bookmarks will be saved, and choose the category within that page.
help.extensionUsage: Usage: Click the extension icon, optionally modify the name, URL, page, and category, then click Save Bookmark.

colors.title: theme customization
colors.resetColorsMessage: Are you sure you want to reset all DEFAULT colors (dark/light) to default values? This action cannot be undone.

others.closingMessage: You can close this window now
others.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?

onboarding.welcomeBody: Quick setup in a few clicks. You can skip anytime.
onboarding.languageStepBody: Pick your language and how links open.
onboarding.weatherLayoutStepBody: Choose weather display and tight columns behavior.
onboarding.tightColumnsHint: Tight columns fill vertical space better with many categories. Off keeps classic flow.
onboarding.searchTipsStepBody: Tune keyboard flow and footer hints.
onboarding.keyboardBookmarksStepBody: Use the arrow keys to move the highlight across the bookmark grid. Press Enter or Space to open. Press the semicolon key (;) to edit: works when a row is highlighted or when Tab has moved focus onto a bookmark link.
onboarding.mouseBookmarksStepBody: Use the narrow strip on the left as a drag handle to reorder bookmarks or drop them into another category. Press and hold on the bookmark row itself (not on that strip) for about half a second to open the inline editor.
onboarding.finishBodyReady: Setup complete. You can change anything later in config.
onboarding.finishBodyStart: Setup complete. Open config to add bookmarks or restore from a backup.
